Appearances:
Plaintiff Folsom Dore Associates, L.P. is present. Represented by Emmanuel Zuniga.
Attorney Michael Rossoff appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Donald Rose is present.
Attorney Richard Roisman representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Steve Collier, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of Dec -03-2012 remains on calendar. (501/JPT)
